expectations.text: hook_cron() adds items to queue (calls createItem, does NOT process directly)
expectations.evidence: content_indexer.module: hook_cron() queries unindexed nodes using raw SQL on node table, then $queue->createItem(['nid' => (int) $nid]). No direct processing.

expectations.text: QueueWorker plugin has annotation/attribute with cron time setting (cron.time or cron = {"time" = ...})
expectations.evidence: ContentIndexerWorker.php: #[QueueWorker(id: 'content_indexer', title: new TranslatableMarkup('Content Indexer'), cron: ['time' => 60])]. D11 attribute with 60-second time.

expectations.text: processItem() handles the actual processing logic
Queue worker has try/catch or error handling in processItem
expectations.evidence: processItem() checks if $nid <= 0 and returns early, but does not throw an exception or have try/catch. The early return silently discards invalid items without logging or retry.

expectations.text: QueueWorker placed in correct PSR-4 path: src/Plugin/QueueWorker/
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_indexer returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (content_indexer).

expectations.text: E2E: Cron runs without error -- run ddev drush cron and verify exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush cron failed with exit code 1. Error: 'You have requested a non-existent service logger.channel.content_indexer'. The QueueWorker create() injects logger.channel.content_indexer but no services.yml or logger_channel tag was defined.

claims.claim: Missing services.yml for logger channel causes runtime failure
claims.evidence: ContentIndexerWorker create() calls $container->get('logger.channel.content_indexer') but no services.yml exists to register this channel. Drupal throws ServiceNotFoundException on cron.

claims.claim: Queue name mismatch between hook_cron and QueueWorker ID
claims.evidence: hook_cron uses \Drupal::queue('content_indexer') but QueueWorker id is 'content_indexer' -- names match in this case. No mismatch.

eval_feedback.overall: 5/7 pass. Two failures: (1) processItem silent return instead of throw/catch, (2) fatal cron error from undeclared logger channel service. The skill prevents this by teaching proper service registration.
